question: 2026年1月每天有多少行程？
raw_output: {"strategy": "g3_direct", "primary_table": "gold.dws_daily_trip_summary", "joins": [{"table": "gold.dim_date", "on": "gold.dim_date.date = gold.dws_daily_trip_summary.trip_date", "type": "INNER"}], "where_clauses": ["gold.dim_date.date BETWEEN DATE '2026-01-01' AND DATE '2026-01-31'"], "group_by": ["gold.dim_date.date"], "order_by": ["gold.dim_date.date"], "aggregations": [{"expr": "SUM(trip_count)", "alias": "trip_count"}], "limit": null, "downgrade_reason": null, "confidence": 0.95}
